Entries.MovieInvitation: Date night with ol' Pam, huh? Hah!$h#$b#Sure thing, kid... I'll see you there.
Entries.summer_Tue2: Oh, it's {{Random: {{Hana.GNMTokens/Title}} }} @.#$e#Do you need my help or something?
Entries.summer_Fri: ...Yeah?#$e#You're a fine lookin' young {{Lowercase: {{Random: {{Hana.GNMTokens/AdultAntiquatedNoun}} }} }}. What're you wastin' your time talkin' to someone like me for?
